overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy walking along a moonlit lakeside trail, stopping at a rocky overlook to observe the misty mountain landscape, then turning to walk back. The scene features dramatic night lighting with a full moon, dense vegetation, and ancient ruins visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: lakeside nature trail with rocky cliffs

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path beside the lake, heading toward the rocky outcrop ahead

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff with sparse vegetation rising on the left side of the path
calm lake water reflecting the night sky, bordered by reeds
tall green reeds and grasses growing at the water's edge
narrow dirt trail winding along the lakeshore
distant mountain peaks silhouetted against the cloudy night sky
leafless dead tree trunk standing near the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt trail beside a calm lake at night. Rocky cliffs rise on the left while tall reeds line the water's edge to the right. The path winds through dense vegetation with distant mountains visible under a cloudy, moonlit sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky overlook point with panoramic lake view

events.description: character stops walking and stands on rocky outcrop to observe the landscape
character turns around to face back toward the trail

agents.ego_description: standing still on the rocky outcrop, panning the camera to take in the moonlit lake and mountain vista

entered.detail: large flat rock formation serving as a viewpoint over the lake
tall cylindrical ancient structure visible in the distance across the lake
bright full moon partially obscured by clouds, casting reflection on water
bush with distinctive red leaves growing on the rocky shore
broad-leafed aquatic plants growing in the shallow water near the shore

segments.scene_description: The character stands on a rocky outcrop overlooking a vast misty lake under a full moon. The camera pans across the panoramic view showing distant mountains, an ancient tower ruin across the water, and the moon's reflection shimmering on the surface. Red foliage and aquatic plants frame the foreground.

events.description: character begins walking back along the shoreline away from the overlook

agents.ego_description: turning away from the overlook and walking back along the rocky shoreline toward the original path

entered.detail: rocky edge of the lake with uneven stone surfaces
tall palm trees with slender trunks visible on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character turns away from the panoramic view and walks back along the rocky shoreline. Palm trees become visible on the right as the path curves, with the ancient tower still visible in the distant background. The lake water is now to the left as the character returns toward the trail.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a narrow lakeside trail to a panoramic mountain overlook before returning along the shoreline. It begins with the character walking a winding dirt path flanked by rocky cliffs and tall reeds under a cloudy, moonlit sky. As the character reaches a rocky outcrop, the view expands into a wide panorama of a misty lake where a full moon reflects on the water and an ancient tower ruin stands in the distance. The scene then shifts as the character turns away from the vista, moving back along the rocky shore where red foliage gives way to palm trees. Finally, the camera follows the character as the path curves, keeping the distant tower in sight while the lake shifts to the left.
